plugins.name: tiered-development
plugins.description: Multi-tier model delegation: Opus coordinates (brainstorm + gate) and picks a tier per slice (or a Sonnet composer does) — Sonnet-capable design & review via difficulty-driven Opus/Fable integrators (Opus default, Fable on high difficulty), Opus builds substantive code, Sonnet mechanical work & verification, Haiku menial edits. Fable spent sparingly.
